title: Uruguayan Liver Delight
description: A classic Uruguayan dish made with crispy onions and a hint of liver flavor.
instructions: 1. In a large pan, heat the butter over medium heat. Add the crispy onions and cook until golden brown.
2. In a separate pan, cook the Uruguayan liver over medium-high heat until browned on both sides.
3. In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, egg, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
4. Dip each piece of liver into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
5. Dredge the liver in the bread crumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
6. Place the coated liver pieces into the pan with the crispy onions.
7. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side or until the liver is cooked through.
8. Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and crispy onions.
10. Serve with your favorite Uruguayan side dishes.
